name: IpssM
title: IPSS-M — Molecular International Prognostic Scoring System for MDS
description: IPSS-M integrates clinical, cytogenetic, and molecular features (31 genes) into a continuous log₂-hazard-ratio score for adult patients with myelodysplastic syndromes. Derived and published by Bernard E et al., NEJM Evidence 2022;1(7):EVIDoa2200008; reference R implementation at github.com/papaemmelab/ipssm.

item.text: Bone marrow blasts (% of nucleated cells)
SF3B1 favorable phenotype (mutated, no del(5q), no adverse comutation)

valueExpression.expression: iif(%score > 1.5, 'very high', iif(%score > 0.5, 'high', iif(%score > 0, 'intermediate-high', iif(%score > -0.5, 'intermediate-low', iif(%score > -1.5, 'low', 'very low')))))
